canonical_action: re-index KB articles keyed by the phrasing of the support ticket whose question originally prompted the article's creation, instead of the article's own title/body content, to speed up retrieval matches
closure_reason: keying by the originating ticket's phrasing only matches future tickets that echo that same wording; it made no difference (or worse) for the majority of tickets, which are paraphrased differently, so overall retrieval quality measurably dropped
measured_outcome: precision@3 rose to ~0.95 on the narrow echo-phrasing subset but fell well below baseline on the majority paraphrased subset, dropping overall precision@3 further; parked
